summary: Frontend-only testing of web-city SPA (Gradačac Mapa) focused on mobile optimization features. All 8 requested features PASS. MobileBottomNav, Footer padding, DownloadBanner phone mockup hiding, hamburger menu, desktop nav, lokacije grid, offers section, and admin panel login all working correctly.
action_items: MINOR: Admin dashboard 'Posljednja obavještenja' section shows TEST notifications (TEST History Notification, TEST Notification, TEST History Category Check, etc.) left over from previous automated tests. These are in the notifications collection. Consider cleaning them if they affect production appearance.

MINOR: 'Istaknute lokacije' section on homepage shows only 1 location card because only 1 location has images (filter: l.images && l.images.length > 0). Consider adding images to more locations so the 4-column grid is populated.
NOTE: Previous iteration_30 bug (Kontakt Poruke missing from admin sidebar) has been FIXED - sidebar now shows Kontakt Poruke link and navigates correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All mobile optimization features are working: MobileBottomNav (fixed bottom, 5 tabs, active state), Footer pb-24 on mobile (96px prevents overlap), DownloadBanner phone mockup hidden on xs (hidden sm:flex), hamburger menu opens mobile drawer, desktop nav visible at 1280px. Homepage shows 8 category pills, 1 featured location (only 1 has images), 1 active offer (20% popusta na ćevape - no test data). Admin panel login works and sidebar has Kontakt Poruke link.

feature_test_results.homepage_loads: PASS - Title: 'Gradačac Mapa - Digitalni Vodič', all sections load
feature_test_results.desktop_nav_1280px: PASS - Lokacije, Događaji, Vijesti, Znamenitosti, Hitni br., Preuzmi App visible
feature_test_results.mobile_hamburger: PASS - md:hidden button opens drawer with all nav links + X closes
feature_test_results.mobile_bottom_nav: PASS - Fixed bottom nav with 5 tabs, active tab highlights, hidden on desktop
feature_test_results.lokacije_page_grid: PASS - 23 locations shown in grid with search/filter/category controls
feature_test_results.footer_no_overlap: PASS - Footer container has pb-24 (96px) on mobile, main has pb-14 (56px)
feature_test_results.offers_no_test_data: PASS - Only 1 offer: '20% popusta na ćevape - Restoran Stari Grad', no TEST_ entries
feature_test_results.featured_locations: PASS - Section visible, 1 location card shown (only 1 with images in DB)
feature_test_results.categories_8_pills: PASS - 8 categories: Restorani, Kafići, Marketi, Apoteke, Smještaj, Servisi, Benzinske, Parkinzi
feature_test_results.admin_panel_login: PASS - Login form visible at /api/admin-panel/, successful login, Dashboard loads
feature_test_results.download_banner_mockup_hidden: PASS - Phone mockup has 'hidden sm:flex' class, display:none at 375px viewport
